mapper.select:
SELECT code, parentCode, codeName, sortOrder, useYn, createdUser, createdDate, updateUser, updatedDate FROM code_info
AND parentCode = #{parentCode}
AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND codeName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{codeName}, '%')
ORDER BY parentCode, sortOrder, code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO code_info (code, parentCode, codeName, sortOrder, useYn) VALUES (#{code}, #{parentCode}, #{codeName}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE code_info SET parentCode = #{parentCode}, codeName = #{codeName}, sortOrder = #{sortOrder}, useYn = #{useYn}, updatedDate = NOW() WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM code_info WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM code_info WHERE parentCode = #{code}
SELECT code, parentCode, codeName, sortOrder, useYn FROM code_info ORDER BY COALESCE(parentCode, ''), sortOrder, code
SELECT CONCAT('CODE', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(code, 5) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM code_info WHERE code REGEXP '^CODE[0-9]+$'
